name: Florentino

skills.name: Shuffle
skills.description: After leaving combat or touching a bouquet, enhances the next Basic Attack to include a dash and deal extra damage. If the attack hits a hero, recovers Health. He can dash again after the initial dash.

skills.name: Blossom
skills.description: Tosses a bouquet, damaging and stunning the first enemy hit, then scatters more bouquets. Touching a bouquet enhances his Basic Attack and refreshes the cooldown of Triple Threat.

skills.name: Triple Threat
skills.description: Attacks the target 3 times, dealing damage. Each hit deals extra true damage and reduces the cooldown of Blossom. He can dash after each hit.

skills.name: Gentlemen's Duel
skills.description: Dashes forward and marks the first target, increasing their damage taken, then scatters bouquets. While the skill is active, recovers twice as much Health and gains crowd control immunity. He can dash again after the initial dash.

skillsZh.name: 劍步
skillsZh.description: 弗洛倫脫戰或觸碰花束時，將強化下次普攻，附帶突進效果並額外造成傷害，若擊中英雄則獲得回復值，突進結束後可快速位移。

skillsZh.name: 落英
skillsZh.description: 弗洛倫投擲花束對首位敵人造成傷害和暈眩並散出花束，觸碰花束獲得強化普攻，並重置【拂花】冷卻時間。

skillsZh.name: 拂花
skillsZh.description: 弗洛倫攻擊目標三次，造成傷害，每段傷害額外附帶真實傷害，並減少【落英】冷卻時間，每次結束後可快速位移。

skillsZh.name: 獨秀
skillsZh.description: 弗洛倫朝指定方向突進並標記首位目標，提升其所受傷害並散出花束，技能持續期間回復效果加倍並獲得霸體，突進結束後可快速位移。

tips: Build: Axe of Torment, Sage's Sanctuary, Spikemail.
tipsZh: 弗洛倫（對抗路）：梯度 S+，勝率 50.86%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：暗影戰斧、賢者的庇護、反傷刺甲.

faqs.question: Is Florentino good in current season?
faqs.answer: Florentino is Tier S+ Warrior with 50.86% win rate, 0.5% pick rate, and 6.36% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Florentino build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Axe of Torment, Sage's Sanctuary, Spikemail, Ravage - Phantom, Glacial Buckler, Destiny.

faqs.question: How to counter Florentino?
faqs.answer: Pick Data unavailable, Data unavailable, Data unavailable. Strong into Data unavailable, Data unavailable, Data unavailable.

faqsZh.question: 弗洛倫 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 弗洛倫 為 S+ 梯度，勝率 50.86%、選取 0.5%、禁用 6.36%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 弗洛倫 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：暗影戰斧、賢者的庇護、反傷刺甲、侵略・怒魂、極寒風暴、名刀・司命.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 弗洛倫？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Data unavailable、Data unavailable、Data unavailable。弗洛倫 克制 Data unavailable、Data unavailable、Data unavailable。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Data unavailable, Data unavailable, Data unavailable. Weak into: Data unavailable, Data unavailable, Data unavailable.
metaAnalysisZh: 克制：Data unavailable、Data unavailable、Data unavailable；被克制：Data unavailable、Data unavailable、Data unavailable
